ValidationRule.description: Applies to the "DX Software Services" Case record type PRIOR: MM NEW: MG 2202.09.22 cleaned up formatting + Error Msg
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) ,OR(RecordType.Name = 'Dx Software Services' ,RecordTypeId = '0123A000001GjKo') /*Dx Software Services EMEA L2 */ ,ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed') ,NOT(Confirm__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_004: Please use the "Close This Case" button to confirm the Type of Case and to close the Case.
